feed.title: Peptide,Amyloids,Peptides YY,peptide synthesis,Custom Peptide, MOG(35-55)ß-Amyloid,Melanocyte Stimulating Hormones(MSH) ,Adrenocorticotropic Hormones (ACTH)
feed.subtitle: Chengdu Shengnuo is famous as a high-tech company in the peptide synthesis industry,main products include C- Peptides,Neuropeptide Y & Analogs,Melanin Concentrating Hormone More than 50 peptide drugs and key technologies of large-scale production have been put on the market at home and abroad, and the single batch output can reach kg level; It has international leading technologies such as large-scale production technology of thiocyclopeptide, large-scale production technology of carbocyclic peptide, complex peptide technology, rapid peptide synthesis technology, etc.; it has applied for 23 invention patents; it has obtained 5 invention patents, and has become the leader of domestic peptide industry with its excellent key technology of peptide synthesis and modification.
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2020, Peptide,Amyloids,Peptides YY,peptide synthesis,Custom Peptide, MOG(35-55)ß-Amyloid,Melanocyte Stimulating Hormones(MSH) ,Adrenocorticotropic Hormones (ACTH)
